Containers.Name: Unraid Gemini CLI
Containers.Description: Integrated Gemini CLI for AI-assisted Unraid server management.
Containers.Overview:
Unraid Gemini CLI brings the power of Gemini's AI-assisted management directly to your Unraid WebUI.
[b]Features:[/b] - AI-assisted server management. - Integrated CLI interface. - Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) safety for critical operations.
